Unit: Required if the price type is Unit. Leave this field empty if the price Type is either Fixed or Variable.
Min Price: Optional (This field can only be modified when pricing type is variable); The value should be Tax-Exclusive as per your Display Price setting in the BackOffice.
Max Price: Optional (This field can only be modified when pricing type is variable); The value should be Tax-Exclusive as per your Display Price setting in the BackOffice.
Supplier Price: Optional(this field can only be modified if 'Fix Supplier Price' is selected for at least one store in Account Settings)
Inventory Type: Optional(Simple/Composite/Serialized; Simple by default if tracking inventory)
Track Stock Levels: Required; Enter 0 to disable; 1 to enable
Gembira Momento_Quantity: Optional; 0 by default if tracking inventory
Kitchen Station: Optional; Leave it blank for Default Kitchen Station; Enter 'Do Not Print Kitchen Docket' to not print kitchen docket
Product Id: Please DO NOT TOUCH this column; as it contains each product's unique reference ID. Doing so will result in unsuccessful import for all products listed in this sheet.
Online Price: Optional; The value should be Tax-Exclusive as per your Display Price setting in the BackOffice.
Online Discounted Price: Optional; The value should be Tax-Exclusive as per your Display Price setting in the BackOffice.
